endo.query: (root canal OR endodontic OR pulp capping)

perio.query: (periodontitis OR scaling root planing OR keratinized mucosa)

plaque.query: ("dental plaque"[tiab] OR "dental biofilm"[tiab] OR "supragingival plaque"[tiab] OR "plaque control"[tiab] OR "plaque index"[tiab])

toothpick-method.query: ("toothpick method"[tiab] OR "Watanabe method"[tiab] OR "toothpick technique"[tiab]) AND (toothbrush*[tiab] OR toothbrushing[tiab] OR plaque[tiab] OR gingiv*[tiab] OR periodont*[tiab] OR "oral hygiene"[tiab] OR dental[tiab] OR "peri-implant"[tiab])

floss-interdental.query: ("dental floss"[tiab] OR flossing[tiab] OR "interdental brush"[tiab] OR "interdental brushes"[tiab] OR "interproximal brush"[tiab] OR "interdental cleaning"[tiab] OR "interdental aids"[tiab] OR "oral irrigator"[tiab] OR "water flosser"[tiab])

water-flosser.query: ("oral irrigator"[tiab] OR "oral irrigators"[tiab] OR "oral irrigation"[tiab] OR "water flosser"[tiab] OR "water flossing"[tiab] OR "water jet"[tiab] OR "dental water jet"[tiab] OR Waterpik[tiab] OR "powered irrigation"[tiab]) AND (toothbrush*[tiab] OR plaque[tiab] OR gingiv*[tiab] OR periodont*[tiab] OR interdental[tiab] OR "oral hygiene"[tiab] OR "peri-implant"[tiab] OR orthodontic[tiab])

sensodyne.query: (Sensodyne[tiab] OR (("potassium nitrate"[tiab] OR "calcium sodium phosphosilicate"[tiab] OR NovaMin[tiab] OR "stannous fluoride"[tiab] OR CPP-ACP[tiab]) AND (dentifrice[tiab] OR toothpaste[tiab]) AND (hypersensitiv*[tiab] OR sensitivity[tiab])))

fluoride-topical.query: ("fluoride varnish"[tiab] OR "fluoride gel"[tiab] OR "acidulated phosphate fluoride"[tiab] OR "APF gel"[tiab] OR "fluoride foam"[tiab] OR "silver diamine fluoride"[tiab]) AND (caries[tiab] OR demineralization[tiab] OR remineralization[tiab] OR enamel[tiab])

caries-acid-mechanism.query: ("Streptococcus mutans"[tiab] OR cariogenic[tiab] OR acidogenic[tiab] OR aciduric[tiab]) AND (acid[tiab] OR acidogenicity[tiab] OR demineralization[tiab] OR virulence[tiab] OR "acidic microenvironment"[tiab] OR dysbiosis[tiab])
